title: hedera helix f. helix
intro: Hedera helix f. helix, also known as the English ivy, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Araliaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Hedera helix f. helix include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or cream, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
